settings.text_box_1_content:
Commercial Laundry Equipment for Sale

in BC, Alberta, and the Yukon
settings.text_box_2_content:
Bichin Laundry Equipment supplies commercial laundry equipment for BC, Alberta, and Yukon laundromats and On-Premise laundry operations that need reliable, high-performance machines built for serious daily laundry room use.


We help laundromat owners (as well as operators in hospitality, healthcare, care facilities, multi-housing, fitness, and other high-volume laundry environments) choose equipment that fits their workflow, utility setup, capacity needs, and long-term business goals.

settings.main_paragraph: On-Premise & Vended Commercial & Industrial Laundry Machines for Sale

settings.text_box_1_content: Commercial Laundry Equipment That Works as Hard as You Do
settings.text_box_2_content:
When you run a laundromat or manage an on-premise laundry room, equipment performance affects everything — customer experience, staff efficiency, utility costs, throughput, and downtime. Bichin Laundry Equipment supplies Dexter heavy-duty commercial laundry machines and Huebsch Small Chassis washers and dryers designed to process large loads, handle repeated use, and deliver dependable results in demanding environments.


We work with customers who are:

⦿ Opening a new laundromat

⦿ Retooling or upgrading an existing laundromat

⦿ Replacing aging commercial washers or dryers

⦿ Expanding a hotel, healthcare, or care home laundry room

⦿ Building a more efficient on-premise laundry setup


We currently sell a variety of capacities for Dexter OPL (On-Premise Laundry) hardmount washers, softmount washers, single dryers, stacked dryers, and washer-dryer stackers. To figure out which OPL machines will work well with your business operations and the space (and infrastructure) you have available, check out our current selection of Dexter OPL machines and then get in touch so we can help you get the right machine for the job.
settings.text_box_3_content:
Vended Commercial Washers

Vended commercial washing machines are built for constant use in self-serve laundry environments. They need to be durable, efficient, and easy for customers to operate. We sell a wide variety of Dexter vended washing machines—large capacity hard and soft mount—and Huebsch small chassis machines.
settings.text_box_4_content:
Vended Commercial Tumble Dryers

Vended commercial dryers need to keep pace with (or, better yet, keep one step ahead of) washer volume while drying efficiently, and helping reduce wait times for customers. Our selection of vended Dexter tumble dryers cover a wide array of situations, from high capacity, quick turnaround to small stackers that fit in tight spaces but still get the job done quickly.
settings.text_box_5_content:
Stack Washer-Dryer and Stack Dryer Units

If maximizing floor space matters, stack equipment can help increase capacity without expanding your footprint. Stacked commercial laundry equipment works in a large variety of spaces and configurations, so it’s often a good solution for laundromats (and other laundry facilities that need to fit a lot of machines into a small space).

We currently offer stacked dryers and washer-dryer stackers for sale, with capacities ranging from smaller commercial sizes to large-capacity laundromat equipment.

settings.text_box_1_content:
Huebsch Small Chassis Machines
for Compact Commercial Laundry Rooms
settings.text_box_2_content:
Not every commercial laundry room has the space for a full-size equipment layout. That is where Huebsch Small Chassis (aka light commercial laundry) machines can be a smart fit. Bichin Laundry Equipment now offers these compact commercial laundry solutions for customers who need dependable performance in a smaller footprint.

Huebsch Small Chassis machines are a strong option for apartment buildings, multi-housing laundry rooms, hotels, care facilities, staff laundry rooms, and other on-premise laundry environments where space is limited but durability and performance still matter. They are also a practical choice for smaller laundry rooms that need to make the most of available square footage without sacrificing commercial-grade equipment.

These machines are designed to help businesses maximize laundry capacity while keeping the layout efficient and functional. For property owners and operators, that can mean better use of the room, easier replacement planning, and a more practical equipment solution for tighter spaces.
settings.text_box_3_content:
Why do Huebsch Light Commercial Laundry Machines Appeal to Commercial Laundry Operators?


Compact equipment can be the right answer when:

🧺 Floor space is limited

🧺 A side-by-side washer and dryer setup is not ideal

🧺 You want to improve layout efficiency

🧺 You need commercial-grade performance in a smaller laundry room

🧺 You are upgrading an older shared laundry area or on-premise laundry space

Huebsch Small Chassis machines give customers another option when a standard equipment footprint is not the best fit for the building or the laundry room design.


Huebsch Laundry Machines are a Good Fit for Space-Conscious Laundry Setups

For businesses and property managers trying to balance performance, reliability, and available square footage, Huebsch Small Chassis machines can help create a more efficient laundry setup. They are especially useful in buildings and facilities where laundry demand is steady, but room size is limited.

By adding Huebsch Small Chassis machines to our equipment offering, Bichin Laundry Equipment is now able to help more customers find a commercial laundry solution that matches both your operational needs and your available physical space.

settings.text_box_2_content:
Some operations need more than standard commercial washers and dryers. We currently sell speciality laundry equipment for many different types of laundry operations, such as:

🧺 Flatwork Ironers

🧺 Cabinet dryers

🧺 Wet and dry cleaning models

🧺 Industrial equipment

🧺 Laundry carts

🧺 Related commercial laundry support products, such as parts and chemicals

settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions About Commercial Laundry Equipment
settings.question_1: Can Bichin Laundry Equipment help me choose the right commercial laundry equipment mix for our laundry operations?
settings.answer_1:
Yes, absolutely! Commercial laundry equipment should be matched to your actual operation — not just your wish list.

The Bichin Laundry Equipment team helps customers think through:

  • Available square footage
  • Laundry volume
  • Peak usage times
  • Linen or load types
  • Utility access and installation requirements
  • Revenue goals
  • Capacity mix
  • Workflow efficiency
  • Future growth

We are here to support you through the entire commercial equipment buying process—layout planning, store design, equipment selection, financing assistance, ordering, installation, programming, demonstration, and ongoing service and maintenance.
settings.link_text_1: We're here to make this experience easier for you, get in touch today!
settings.question_2: Why do laundry businesses choose to work with Bichin Laundry Equipment?
settings.answer_2:
Bichin Laundry Equipment is more than a catalog of commercial laundry machines for sale. We work hard to go the extra mile for every customer by providing wide-reaching support in all areas of sales, installations, service, parts, and troubleshooting. Being an authorized supplier and distributor of Dexter and Huebsch commercial laundry equipment means we are trusted by the manufacturers and our machines are supported by warranties, service, planning help, and ongoing customer care. 

We will never “set it and forget it” when you hire us. We are in it for the long haul and we will be here to support you with:

  • Equipment selection
  • Laundromat planning
  • Layout guidance
  • Installation coordination
  • Parts access
  • Maintenance and service
settings.question_3: What types of commercial laundry equipment does Bichin Laundry Equipment sell?
settings.answer_3: Bichin Laundry Equipment supplies Dexter and Huebsch commercial washers, dryers, stack units, on-premise laundry equipment, and other commercial laundry solutions for laundromats and high-volume laundry operations.
settings.question_4: Does Bichin Laundry Equipment sell equipment for laundromats?
settings.answer_4: Yes. Laundromats are a major focus, and Bichin Laundry Equipment’s current core customers are laundromat owners. We help with planning, design, equipment selection, installation, and ongoing support for laundromat owners throughout BC, Alberta, and the Yukon.
settings.question_5: Does Bichin Laundry Equipment also supply equipment for hotels and healthcare facilities?
settings.answer_5: Yes. Bichin Laundry Equipment currently offers commercial laundry equipment sales for businesses beyond laundromats, including including hotels, healthcare environments, and other businesses with large laundry operations, both vended and On-Premise.
settings.question_6: Can Bichin Laundry Equipment help me with selecting the right equipment mix?
settings.answer_6: Yes. Bichin Laundry Equipment’s main mandate is to provide owners and operators of large laundry operations with help designing floor plans, machine mix, quantities, installation, and ongoing support.
settings.question_7: What brands does Bichin Laundry Equipment carry?
settings.answer_7: Bichin Laundry Equipment currently offers commercial laundry equipment from Dexter (both hardmount and softmount models) and Wascomat, as well as small chassis laundry equipment made by Huebsch.
settings.question_8: Do you offer compact commercial laundry machines for smaller laundry rooms?
settings.answer_8: Yes. Bichin Laundry Equipment now offers Huebsch Small Chassis machines for customers who need commercial laundry performance in a smaller footprint. These machines are a strong fit for apartment buildings, hotels, care facilities, staff laundry rooms, and other on-premise laundry spaces where floor space is limited but dependable commercial equipment is still important.
